fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Maine Dietitian License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a dietitian? Here's whether your license transfers to Maine - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: dietitian license reciprocity maine, how to transfer dietitian license to maine, dietitian compact maine, maine dietitian endorsement application

board.name: Board of Licensing of Dietetic Practice
board.parent_dept: Maine Office of Professional and Occupational Regulation (OPOR)

quick_facts.fee_breakdown: $150 license fee + $21 criminal history records check fee

license_types.title: Licensed Dietitian
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice dietetics in Maine, overseen by the Board of Licensing of Dietetic Practice.

license_types.title: Temporary Licensed Dietitian
license_types.description: Maine offers a temporary license for applicants awaiting the CDR examination. It requires a supervised practice plan.

steps.title: Complete Educational Requirements
steps.description: Complete a minimum of a baccalaureate degree from a U.S. regionally accredited college or university with completion of an Accreditation Council for Education in Nutrition and Dietetics (ACEND) accredited didactic program in dietetics.

steps.title: Complete Supervised Practice
steps.description: Complete an ACEND-accredited supervised practice dietetics program.

steps.title: Pass the Registration Examination
steps.description: Successfully pass the Registration Examination for Dietitians administered by the Commission on Dietetic Registration.

documents.detail: Proof of active registration with the Commission on Dietetic Registration.
Processed internally by the Board upon receipt of the $21 fee with an application.
May be required if not submitting primary source verification via the CDR.

provisional_text: Maine offers a temporary dietitian license for applicants who have met the educational and experience requirements but have not yet passed the examination. Temporary licensees must practice under the supervision of a Maine Licensed Dietitian.
reciprocity_text: Maine provides licensure by endorsement for applicants holding a substantially equivalent license in another state or holding active registration as a Registered Dietitian with the CDR. A verification of licensure from the other state(s) must be provided.

faqs.question: How much does a Maine dietitian license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial cost is $171, which includes a $150 license fee and a $21 criminal history records check fee.

faqs.question: When does the Maine license need to be renewed?
faqs.answer: Maine dietitian licenses expire annually on December 31st. The renewal fee is $150. A $50 late fee is added if renewed after the expiration date.

faqs.question: What are the continuing education requirements for Maine?
faqs.answer: Licensees must complete 15 hours of approved continuing education annually. At least 4 of these hours must be from approved Category 1 programs.

faqs.question: Does Maine have reciprocity for dietitians?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers dietitian practice in Maine. To work in Maine, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my dietitian license to Maine?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 3 to 5 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Maine while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Maine provides licensure by endorsement for applicants holding a substantially equivalent license in another state or holding active registration as a Registered Dietitian with the CDR. A verification of licensure from the other state(s) must be provided.

hero.title: Become a Dietitian in Maine
hero.dek: Maine Dietitian License requires completing an accredited dietetics program, passing the Registration Examination for Dietitians, and paying the required fees.
